text: Uncertain retail growth rate due to geopolitical instability. [Podcast](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-spraak/podcast/index.html). [Retail](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/retail/index.html). 08/15/2025 • 1 minute read. [Gerarda Westerhuis](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/gerarda-westerhuis/index.html). In 2025, we expect a slight volume growth of 1 percent for retail, partly due to a recovery in purchasing power. However, the growth rate remains uncertain due to external factors such as geopolitical instability.

Here is a [link to download the video](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/sector-expertise-american-trade-policy-retail-st-original.mp4). ](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/sector-expertise-american-trade-policy-retail-st-thumbnail.jpg)](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/sector-expertise-american-trade-policy-retail-st-720p.mp4)
Growth differences between the retail sectors. Growth varies between the different branches within the retail sector. Drugstores in particular are doing well, while furniture and consumer electronics stores are struggling to grow their sales volumes and turnover. A look ahead into the retail sector. Also read the publication [Retail between local playing field and global shocks](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/sectorprognoses/retail/retail- Tussen-lokaal-speelveld-en-wereldwijde-schokken.html) with our expectations for retail. Download the forecasts of all sectors.
